sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44781" key="eu)pi/neia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπίν-εια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, perh. <sense id="n44781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">elegance</tr_> of style, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30.1</biblScope> </bibl>; cf.sq.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n44781.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐπινείας χάριν</foreign> for <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">embellishment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:4:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.4.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
